comment: GUIDE PURPOSE: Input Validation & Error Handling Guide regarding validation execution, file uploads constraints, mobile keyboards, and storage security

rules.title: Centralized Validation Routines
rules.requirement: Group form validator regular expressions in /lib/validation.ts
rules.mechanism: Run checks on blur and submit events. Display localized errors directly underneath the offending inputs using aria describedby and aria invalid attributes

requirements.email: Verify character patterns and domain restrictions
requirements.phone: Verify phone character sets, capping length between 7 and 20 digits
requirements.text: Trim blank spaces and assert maximum character counts
requirements.files: Verify file size against byte limits and match extension/MIME types

rules.title: Private Storage Standards
rules.requirement: Never upload patient records or medical credentials to public storage buckets
rules.mechanism: Keep storage buckets private. Access records by generating temporary, cryptographically signed URLs (for example expiring in 5 minutes). Log audit actions before generating URLs

rules.title: Mobile Keyboard inputMode Constraints
rules.requirement: Form inputs on mobile must request context appropriate touch keyboards to simplify text entry and prevent formatting errors
rules.mechanism: Enforce attributes like inputMode='numeric' or type='email' / type='tel' on numeric or contact fields to trigger native virtual keyboard assistance in iOS and Android

rules.title: Mobile Input Ergonomics & Autocorrect Controls
rules.requirement: Prevent native mobile virtual keyboards from interfering with text entries or corrupting credentials
rules.mechanism: Enforce autocomplete, autoCorrect='off', autoCapitalize='none', and spellCheck={false} attributes on email, username, token, and password input fields in JSX components

rules.title: Responsive Validation Error Layouts
rules.requirement: Ensure input validation messages are fully readable on narrow viewport sizes
rules.mechanism: Assert that error labels below input containers use wrapping text layouts instead of preventing wrapping. Validate display fidelity down to a 320px viewport without clipping UI boundaries
